name: ObservationExtractRelationshipCodes
title: Observation Extract Relationship Codes
description: Defines the codes used to specify the relationship type in the ObservationExtractExtension.

concept.definition: The child item will be extracted as a component of the parent observation
The child item will be extracted as a separate Observation and the parent Observation will point to it as a hasMember
The child item will be extracted as a separate Observation and the child will have a derivedFrom relationship to the parent.  (Typically the child answer will be a calculated value in this case.)
The child item will be extracted as a separate Observation and there will be no relationship asserted between parent and child
